parameters.content:
## Competitor YouTube Monitor — Weekly Airtable Intelligence Report — WayinVideo Summarization + GPT-4o-mini + Airtable

For marketing teams, product managers, and growth teams who want to automatically track what competitors are saying in their YouTube video content every week — without manually watching hours of competitor videos. Every Monday at 8AM this workflow reads competitor video URLs from your Google Sheet, submits each to WayinVideo Summarization API to get a structured summary with highlights and tags, then sends the summary directly to GPT-4o-mini which extracts ten competitive intelligence fields: content type, messaging angle, key claims, target audience signals, pricing signals, strengths, weaknesses and gaps, opportunity for your team, urgency score, and urgency reasoning. Each video is saved as a structured Airtable record. The Google Sheet row is marked as Processed.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every Monday 8AM** triggers the pipeline automatically each week
- **2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos** reads all rows from the Video Queue tab
- **3. WayinVideo — Submit Summarization** submits the video URL to the Summarization API
- **4. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **5. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results** polls the summaries results endpoint
- **6. IF — Summary Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **8. AI Agent — Extract Competitive Intelligence** sends the WayinVideo summary directly to GPT-4o-mini with full context from the sheet row — no intermediate code node needed
- **10. Code — Parse Intelligence Output** extracts all 10 sections via regex, calculates the Monday week date, and assembles the Airtable record
- **11. HTTP — Save to Airtable** creates one record per video with all 16 intelligence fields
- **12. Google Sheets — Mark as Processed** updates the Video Queue row with Processed status and date

## Set up steps
1. In **3. WayinVideo — Submit Summarization** and **5. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **2** and **12** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace YOUR_COMPETITOR_SHEET_ID
4. In **11. HTTP — Save to Airtable** — replace YOUR_AIRTABLE_API_KEY (Personal Access Token, scope: data.records:write), YOUR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID, YOUR_AIRTABLE_TABLE_NAME
5. Create a Google Sheet named Competitor Monitor with tab Video Queue and columns: Video URL, Video Title, Competitor Name, Your Product / Brand, Status, Processed Date
6. Create an Airtable table named Competitor Intelligence with fields: Week (Date), Competitor Name, Video Title, Video URL, Content Type, Messaging Angle, Key Claims Made, Target Audience Signals, Pricing / Offer Signals, Strengths Identified, Weaknesses / Gaps, Opportunity for Us, Urgency Score (Number), Tags, Summary, Status (default: New)

## Schedule and Queue Read
Triggers every Monday at 8AM. Reads all unprocessed competitor video rows from the Video Queue tab in Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo Summarization Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Summarization Submit and Poll
Submits the competitor video URL to the Summarization API. Waits 90 seconds for initial processing. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Summary Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Summary Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds directly to AI analysis. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until summary is ready.

## AI Competitive Intelligence Extraction
GPT-4o-mini reads the WayinVideo summary and sheet context directly — no intermediate code node. Extracts 10 competitive intelligence fields including urgency score and opportunity for your team.

nodes.name: Section — Intelligence Parse, Airtable Save, and Sheet Update

parameters.content:
## Intelligence Parse, Airtable Save, and Sheet Update
Regex extracts all 10 intelligence sections and calculates the Monday week date. HTTP creates an Airtable record with 16 fields. Google Sheets marks the row as Processed.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert competitive intelligence analyst who specializes in extracting strategic insights from competitor video content.

A competitor has published a YouTube video. WayinVideo AI has already summarized it. Your job is to analyze the summary and extract structured competitive intelligence that a marketing or product team can act on.

---

## CONTEXT
- Competitor Name: {{ $('2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos').item.json['Competitor Name'] }}
- Video Title: {{ $('2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos').item.json['Video Title'] }}
- Our Brand / Product: {{ $('2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos').item.json['Your Product / Brand'] }}
- Video URL: {{ $('2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos').item.json['Video URL'] }}

## WAYINVIDEO SUMMARY OUTPUT
- Summary: {{ $('5. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results').item.json.data.summary }}
- Key Highlights: {{ $('5. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results').item.json.data.highlights.map(h => h.desc).join(' | ') }}
- Tags: {{ $('5. WayinVideo — Get Summary Results').item.json.data.tags.join(', ') }}

---

## YOUR TASK
Analyze this competitor video content and extract structured competitive intelligence.

## RULES
1. Base analysis ONLY on the summary and highlights provided — no outside knowledge
2. Be specific and actionable — generic observations are not useful
3. Opportunities must be specific things OUR team could do in response
4. Urgency score: 1 = low threat, 10 = immediate action needed
5. Keep each section concise — 2-4 bullet points maximum per section

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

CONTENT_TYPE:
[Choose one: Product Demo / Tutorial / Thought Leadership / Case Study / Comparison / Announcement / Customer Story / Promotional / Other]

MESSAGING_ANGLE:
[What is the core message or narrative they are pushing? 2-3 sentences.]

KEY_CLAIMS:
- [Specific claim 1 they are making about their product or service]
- [Specific claim 2]
- [Specific claim 3 if applicable]

TARGET_AUDIENCE_SIGNALS:
[Who are they targeting based on the content? What pain points are they addressing? 2-3 sentences.]

PRICING_OFFER_SIGNALS:
[Any pricing mentions, offers, discounts, or value propositions mentioned — or 'None detected']

STRENGTHS_IDENTIFIED:
- [What they are doing well in this content]
- [What advantage they are highlighting]

WEAKNESSES_GAPS:
- [What they are NOT addressing that we could own]
- [Any weak claims or missing proof]

OPPORTUNITY_FOR_US:
- [Specific action our team should take in response]
- [Content we should create to counter or differentiate]

URGENCY_SCORE:
[Number 1-10 only]

URGENCY_REASONING:
[1 sentence explaining why you gave this urgency score]

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "fields": {
    "Week": "{{ $json.weekDate }}",
    "Competitor Name": "{{ $json.competitorName }}",
    "Video Title": "{{ $json.videoTitle }}",
    "Video URL": "{{ $json.videoUrl }}",
    "Content Type": "{{ $json.contentType }}",
    "Messaging Angle": "{{ $json.messagingAngle }}",
    "Key Claims Made": "{{ $json.keyClaims }}",
    "Target Audience Signals": "{{ $json.targetAudience }}",
    "Pricing / Offer Signals": "{{ $json.pricingSignals }}",
    "Strengths Identified": "{{ $json.strengths }}",
    "Weaknesses / Gaps": "{{ $json.weaknesses }}",
    "Opportunity for Us": "{{ $json.opportunity }}",
    "Urgency Score": {{ $json.urgencyScore }},
    "Tags": "{{ $json.tags }}",
    "Summary": "{{ $json.summary }}",
    "Status": "New"
  }
}
